Home
Explore careers
Optometry
Optometry
Working in vision care offers many rewarding career opportunities. As an optometrist, you'll examine a person's eyes to make sure they get the right optical treatment and access to healthcare services. As a dispensing optician, you'll provide advice and supply and fit glasses suitable for a person's lifestyle and vocational needs.
Dispensing optician
Optometrist
